prompt: I already have a CLAUDE.md with my team's existing conventions. I want to adopt linked-intent development without losing any of my existing content. Set it up.

assertions.text: CLAUDE.md still contains all original content (# My Project, ## Conventions, and three bullet points) unmodified
CLAUDE.md has the LID directives block appended (contains 'linked-intent-dev' or 'Linked-Intent Development')
CLAUDE.md contains the '## LID Mode:' heading
The agent's response explicitly summarizes which sections were added to CLAUDE.md
